name: one-star-risk
description: Re-score audit findings for App Store one-star-review risk — a judgment lens, not a detector.

plugins.name: one-star-risk
plugins.description: Re-score audit findings (a diff, a file, a TODO list, or another auditor's output) for App Store one-star-review risk. A judgment LENS, not a detector: it assigns each finding a band with a NAMED, overridable trigger, runs an aggressive skeptic pass that demotes any band it can't defend, and grounds in real competitor reviews via a pluggable provider seam (free App Store RSS default, optional paid adapters — e.g. Applyra, Appfigures — with no vendor required or endorsed). Reports its grounding tier every run and degrades loudly when ungrounded.
